ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizing_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing standard (e.g., UK, EU, US) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sizing standard is applicable */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the standard became effective */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sizing standard (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated sizing standard */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "size_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing size information for the category */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated version */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size chart is applicable */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size chart is applicable */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES sizing_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body measurement entry */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated size chart */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., bust, waist) */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* Measurement value (e.g., '81cms32') */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the measurement is applicable */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the measurement is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_body_measurements_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_chart ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department (e.g., Women, Men, Kids) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category if applicable */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product developer, marketer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated size chart */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was updated */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_chart ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated size chart */,
  "selected_size" TEXT /* Size that was selected by customers */,
  "selection_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the size was selected */,
  "return_count" INTEGER /* Number of returns for the size */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for returns (e.g., size too small, size too large) */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range for the analytics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_chart ("size_chart_id")
)
